app_subtitle: Ask the Abyss · The Abyss Answers
pool_placeholder: Ask the abyss, write your wish...
pool_throw_hint: Write your wish and cast it into the abyss for others to light and bless
pool_throw_meaning: When blessings gather, wishes grow stronger
pool_fish_hint: Pull a wish from the abyss and light a lantern for it
pool_fish_meaning: Your single blessing might light up someone's path
pool_light_hint: Light a lantern for a wish — more light, more visibility
pool_light_meaning: The brighter the lanterns, the more likely a wish comes true
pool_oracle_hint: Let the Pool Spirit see where your path leads
pool_share_hint: Share your wish, invite friends to light lanterns for you
pool_share_card_title: I made a wish on KnockFate
pool_share_card_call: Come light a lantern for me! Make your own wish too —
pool_share_card_principle: The more people focus on the same hope, the more likely it comes true.
snack_wish_sunk: 🌊 Your wish sinks into the abyss...
snack_lantern_lit: 🏮 You lit a lantern for this wish
snack_no_fulfill: No wishes ready for fulfillment yet
spirit_saw: I saw your wish at the bottom of the pool...
spirit_ask_reading: Want me to see where this path leads?
spirit_first_free: This is your first ask — the abyss reads it for free.
spirit_pay_hint: First reading was a gift. Further asks require an offering.
spirit_error_msg: The abyss is silent for now. Please try again later.
shop_fulfill_section_desc: Celebrate wishes come true with fireworks
shop_fortune_desc: Draw your fortune from the bamboo tube
shop_fulfillment_desc: Celebrate a wish come true with fireworks
shop_no_capsule: No wishes ready for fulfillment yet. Keep waiting for your capsules!
capsule_empty_hint: They appear after making a wish
principle_body: This isn't superstition — it's a psychological principle: the more people focus their thoughts and energy toward the same direction, the more likely things move that way. Each lantern is a blessing and a beam of attention.
reading_casting:
The Pool Spirit is casting...
Please hold your intention.
reading_unlock_desc: Deep reading + hexagram + anonymous stories + action plan
fulfill_prompt: Time has come. Fulfill your wish.
disclaimer_virtual_notice: All content in KnockFate is for entertainment only and does not involve real religious ceremonies. The realization of wishes depends on your own efforts and actions.
disclaimer_pay_notice: You are purchasing virtual in-app animated effects. No real-world effect is produced. Fees support platform operations. No refunds.
disclaimer_responsible: Please consume responsibly and do not become addicted.
